items.title: Upgrade Node Setup Action to v6 in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/setup-node from version 4 to 6, enhancing caching capabilities and improving workflow performance. Key changes include automatic caching for npm and updates to dependencies like ts-jest and prettier. Ensure your runner is compatible with the latest version for optimal performance.

items.title: Update vue-chartjs to 5.3.3 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps vue-chartjs from version 5.2.0 to 5.3.3, introducing important bug fixes including improvements to ARIA labels and CI for the website. The changes enhance accessibility and ensure smoother functionality within the platform. Additionally, the update aligns with the latest dependency requirements.

items.title: Update hatchling dependency for better compatibility in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the hatchling requirement in the project to allow versions from 1.21.0 up to, but not including, 1.30.0. This change enables the use of the latest features and fixes from hatchling v1.29.0, including improved handling of the SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH. Overall, it enhances the project's build system reliability and performance.

items.title: Upgrade Node Setup Action to Version 6 in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/setup-node from version 4 to 6, enhancing caching capabilities and improving workflow performance. Key changes include automatic package manager detection and various dependency upgrades, ensuring better compatibility and security. The modifications are reflected in the publish workflow file.

items.title: Upgrade Java Setup Action to v5 in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/setup-java from version 4 to 5, ensuring compatibility with Node 24 and enhancing error handling. Additionally, it includes several dependency upgrades and bug fixes that improve overall functionality and security. The changes will help maintain a robust and efficient workflow for Java projects.

items.title: Update hatchling dependency for better compatibility in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the hatchling requirement in the project to allow versions from 1.21.0 up to, but not including, 1.30.0. The change enhances compatibility with the latest features and fixes introduced in hatchling v1.29.0, including improved handling of the SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH. This ensures smoother builds and better functionality moving forward.

items.title: Update Solana Wallet Adapter to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This PR updates the @solana/wallet-adapter-wallets package from version 0.19.36 to 0.19.37. Key changes include various dependency updates and enhancements to wallet functionality, which will improve overall performance and compatibility. The update also includes logo updates for several wallet adapters.

items.title: Update React to 19.2.4 for improved performance in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps React from version 19.2.3 to 19.2.4, enhancing the performance and security of our application. Key changes include additional DoS mitigations for Server Actions and improved hardening of Server Components. This ensures a more robust user experience and aligns with the latest best practices.

items.title: Enhance Frida v2 Integration in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the Frida backend service with startup and shutdown hooks, along with WeChat attachment logic. It includes the migration of WeChat 3.9.10.27 Frida scripts into the Wisdom package and adds internal V2 service methods for contacts and wait-message functionalities. Existing routes are maintained, allowing for version-specific queries without breaking API compatibility.

items.title: Standardize Engineering Toolchain in We Chat Claude Code 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a standardized engineering toolchain for the project. Key changes include the addition of ESLint and Prettier configurations, a Vitest unit test setup, and Husky git hooks for pre-commit and pre-push actions. Additionally, a CI quality workflow has been implemented to ensure code quality through type checks, linting, and testing.

items.title: Fix macOS and Windows app icons for proper display in We Chat Claude Code 🔧
items.summary: This update adds a proper macOS icon asset and regenerates the Windows icon with complete multi-size entries. The electron-builder configuration was updated to use the new .icns file on macOS and explicit icons for the NSIS installer on Windows. Local builds and packaging validations confirm the icons are correctly applied, improving app appearance on both platforms.

items.title: Upgrade TypeScript to 5.9.3 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps TypeScript from version 5.8.3 to 5.9.3, incorporating the latest features and fixes. Key changes include improved type-checking and performance enhancements. This upgrade ensures better compatibility and stability for our frontend development.

Additionally, the workflow now uses updated actions/checkout and action/cache versions, aligning with the latest best practices.

items.title: Upgrade Java setup action to v5 for improved CI in M C P Nano Banana 🚀

The upgrade includes important dependency updates, enhanced error handling, and support for newer Java versions, which improves build stability and security. The change also updates related actions like 'actions/checkout' to newer versions, ensuring compatibility and better performance.

items.title: Update hatchling dependency for better compatibility in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the hatchling requirement in the project to allow versions from 1.21.0 up to, but not including, 1.30.0. items.title: Upgrade setup-node action to v6 for improved caching and dependencies in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the GitHub Actions setup-node from version 4 to 6 in the publish workflow. The new version introduces automatic package manager caching, dependency upgrades, and improved performance. Workflow steps now use actions/checkout@v6 and setup-node@v6 with Node.js 20, enhancing build efficiency and security.

items.title: Improve desktop release workflow reliability with universal macOS build in We Chat Claude Code 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the unsupported macOS runner matrix with a universal macOS build on macos-latest, enhancing build consistency. Core GitHub actions were upgraded to v5 with Node 24 runtime enabled for JavaScript actions. The manual dispatch now always publishes a release by auto-generating tags if omitted. Documentation in the README was updated to reflect these workflow changes.
